description: Guardrail overlay for genomics research teams

deniedTopics.name: participant-reidentification
deniedTopics.description: Attempts to re-identify study participants from genomic data
examples: Find the identity of the patient with this variant
Cross-reference variants with public genealogy databases
Match this sample to a specific individual

deniedTopics.name: germline-discrimination
deniedTopics.description: Using germline data for discriminatory purposes
examples: Identify employees with genetic predisposition to disease
Screen candidates based on genetic markers
